title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 46.140 - Ripley
text:
46.140.  Ripley. — Beginning at the south boundary line of the state, at a point where the state line crosses the range line between ranges one and two, west; thence north with said range line to the southern boundary of Carter County; thence east with the southern boundary of said Carter County to the western boundary line of Butler County; thence with said western boundary line of Butler County to the point of its intersection with the southern boundary line of the state; thence with the state line to the place of beginning.
(RSMo 1939 § 13646) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11987; 1919 § 9389; 1909 § 3606
